scripts.build:local: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --workspace apps/auth-app run build" "npm --workspace apps/index-studio-app run build" && npm --workspace apps/host-app run build:local
scripts.build:dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --workspace apps/auth-app run build:dev" "npm --workspace apps/index-studio-app run build:dev" && npm --workspace apps/host-app run build:dev
scripts.build:uat: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --workspace apps/auth-app run build:uat" "npm --workspace apps/index-studio-app run build:uat" && npm --workspace apps/host-app run build:uat
scripts.build:prod: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --workspace apps/auth-app run build:prod" "npm --workspace apps/index-studio-app run build:prod" && npm --workspace apps/host-app run build:prod
scripts.build:dev-preview: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --workspace apps/auth-app run build:dev" "npm --workspace apps/index-studio-app run build:dev-preview" && npm --workspace apps/host-app run build:dev-preview
scripts.build:uat-preview: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --workspace apps/auth-app run build:uat" "npm --workspace apps/index-studio-app run build:uat-preview" && npm --workspace apps/host-app run build:uat-preview
scripts.build:prod-preview: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm --workspace apps/auth-app run build:prod" "npm --workspace apps/index-studio-app run build:prod-preview" && npm --workspace apps/host-app run build:prod-preview
scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:main" "npm run dev:host"
scripts.preview:all: concurrently "npm run preview:auth" "npm run preview:main" "npm run preview:host"
scripts.preview:all:dev-preview: concurrently "npm run preview:auth:dev" "npm run preview:main:dev" "npm run preview:host:dev-preview"
scripts.preview:all:uat-preview: concurrently "npm run preview:auth:uat" "npm run preview:main:uat" "npm run preview:host:uat-preview"
scripts.preview:all:prod-preview: concurrently "npm run preview:auth:prod" "npm run preview:main:prod" "npm run preview:host:prod-preview"
scripts.start:local: npm run build:local && npm run preview:all
scripts.start:dev: npm run build:dev-preview && npm run preview:all:dev-preview
scripts.start:uat: npm run build:uat-preview && npm run preview:all:uat-preview
scripts.start:prod: npm run build:prod-preview && npm run preview:all:prod-preview
